subcodes.first_line: O my spiritual loved ones! At a time when an ocean of trials and tribulations was surging up and flinging its waves to the heavens
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران رحمانی من در حالتیکه دریای امتحان پرموج گشته و موج بلایا باوج رسیده
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @compassion; kindness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love and unity, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion
